user_description: Transport companies and logistics providers seeking freight opportunities
product_purpose: Carrier interface for Zipmend's transport marketplace
core_features: Filterable transport table with search functionality
Bidding system with vehicle and driver assignment
Multiple view modes (Find transports, Bids, Current/Completed transports)
Bid submission with pricing, vehicle, and driver details
main_workflows: Search and filter available transport jobs
Submit competitive bids on transport opportunities
Assign vehicles and drivers to won transports
Track bid outcomes and transport history
Update company profile and resource information
primary_pain_areas: New carrier onboarding and success rates
user_journey_stages: Transport execution and completion, with status updates, ETAs, and tracking
Post-transport communication, such as CMR, invoice, and feedback

business_context.auction_system: Blind bidding - carriers don't see competitor bids

known_competitor_advantages: Trans.eu: Direct chat and post-bid negotiation capability (also used by Zipmend)
Timocom.com: Biggest FTL/LTL transport exchange platform in Europe (also used by Zipmend)
Other platforms: More transparent bidding processes
